invariant_descriptions.SVP-0: Semantic version contract decisions are enforced at governance gate with fail-closed behavior for invalid promises.
invariant_descriptions.SVP-DETERM-0: Version verdict digest MUST be deterministic for identical promise payloads and policy context.
invariant_descriptions.SVP-AUDIT-0: All verdicts MUST persist to append-only JSONL audit trail with chain-linked digest continuity.

notes: Innovation #24 — Semantic Version Promises. Governance gate enforces semver promise compatibility with deterministic verdict generation and tamper-evident append-only audit evidence.
